import{useEffect}from"react";import{useNavigate,useLocation}from"react-router-dom";import{motion}from"framer-motion";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const GoogleLoginSuccess=()=>{const navigate=useNavigate();const location=useLocation();useEffect(()=>{// Parse query params from URL
